name: North Fork Fire Department
description: North Fork Fire Department is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in North Fork, ID. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The court is free.
